nasb.text: He said to his daughters, “Where is he then? Why is it that you have left the man behind? Invite him to have something to eat.”

esv.text: He said to his daughters, “Then where is he? Why have you left the man? Call him, that he may eat bread.”

cnv.text: 父親對眾女兒說：“他在哪裡？你們為甚麼撇下那人呢？去請他來吃飯。”

ccb.text: 他又问女儿们：“现在那人在哪里？你们怎么可以丢下他不管呢？去请他来吃点东西。”
